holdings.infoBox: WCBR is an equity ETF with a total of 25 individual holdings. The top holdings are CrowdStrike Holdings stock at 7.71%, Datadog at 6.82%, Fortinet at 6.56%, Palo Alto Networks at 6.21%, and Okta, Inc. at 5.55%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree Cybersecurity Fund (WCBR) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the WisdomTree Team8 Cybersecurity index. The fund tracks an index of developed market companies primarily involved in cybersecurity and security-oriented technology. WCBR was launched on Jan 28, 2021 and is issued by WisdomTree.

data.title: Cybersecurity Stocks Find Their Footing
data.text: After their bludgeoning by the “SaaSpocalypse,” cybersecurity stocks are on the mend in a big way. The WisdomTree Cybersecurity Fund (WCBR) confirms as much.

data.title: 2026 will be the year cybersecurity meets AI, says Wedbush's Dan Ives
data.text: Dan Ives, Wedbush, joins 'Power Lunch' to talk how cybersecurity plays could be the next frontier for AI investing in 2026.

data.title: We're trying to mainstream crypto, the asset class, says WisdomTree CEO
data.text: Jonathan Steinberg, WisdomTree CEO, joins 'TechCheck' to discuss the company's new blockchain-enabled financial service, why investors need this new product and how it shifts WisdomTree's business mod...
